non_goals: External notification channels (Slack, email, SMS, push)
resolved transition automation (auto-resolve on new gaming day, explicit rpc_resolve_alert)

rfc_decisions.D1: Alert persistence via shift_alert table + forward-only state machine → ADR-046 amendment §10
rfc_decisions.D2: Composite UNIQUE key + time-based cooldown (sub-decision of D1)
rfc_decisions.D3: 2-state MVP (open, acknowledged); resolved dormant in CHECK only → deferral in ADR-046 §10
rfc_decisions.D4: compute_failed via last_error column on table_metric_baseline → ADR-046 amendment §8
rfc_decisions.D5: Separate alert_acknowledgment table with is_false_positive flag (sub-decision of D1)

rfc_resolved_questions.Q1: Persist trigger is explicit (page load + manual), not piggybacked on 30s refetch
rfc_resolved_questions.Q2: is_false_positive boolean on alert_acknowledgment, no text parsing

rfc_open_questions.Q3: Unified alert list display (ephemeral cash obs + persistent baseline) — source indicator badge

sec_note_patches: 6 corrections applied from external review (2026-03-24): C1 tenant isolation reworded, C4 CHECK/RPC separation, C6 grant posture, C7 RPC-only mutations added, T7 racing acknowledgment added, RLS Summary replaced with Access/Mutation Summary, last_error access posture added, validation gate expanded
resume_notes: Phase 6: All design artifacts frozen (SCAFFOLD-005, RFC-005, SEC Note, ADR-046 §8+§10, PRD-056 v0.3.0). Ready for EXEC-SPEC generation and build pipeline execution.
